title: Not Rare
description: Never found a blue axolotl? Here is a resource pack for you. This resource pack make pink axolotl rare but the rate of pink axolotl is now the spawning rate of blue axolotl.
body:
Find blue axolotls everywhere. It is very easy just go to a lush cave.

  ――――――――――――――Loved the texture pack? Check out more [here](https://modrinth.com/user/Orenxo)――――――――――――――
